title: Power cut schedule for Wednesday and Thursday
body_lines: The power cut schedule for tomorrow (22) and Thursday (23) for two hour and thirty minutes was announced today, the Public Utilities Commission of Sri Lanka (PUCSL) said.
They said the approval for tomorrow's power shedding was granted following a request from the Ceylon Electricity Board (CEB).
The PUCSL regrets the inconvenience caused to its consumers due to prevailing power cuts.
